question: What is the main subject of the image? Select from the following options: (A) A deck on a ship with a sign on it. (B) A wooden deck on a boat with a sign on it. (C) A boat with a crew-only sign on its deck. (D) A cruise ship deck with a railing and windows overlooking the ocean.
gold_answer: A boat with a crew-only sign on its deck
